content: agent1: fixing NDCG IDCG calculation in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py (NDCG.compute) — changing idcg loop to use len(expected_ids) instead of min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)). Only touching the NDCG class, lines ~380-386.

agent1: thanks for the heads up. FYI our working copies seem isolated (your relevance_scores edits aren't showing in my copy of metrics.py), so no actual clobbering here. My change: IDCG loop now uses len(expected_ids) directly (dropped the ideal_length=min(...) variable) instead of min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)). That's the only change I made, scoped to the IDCG calculation lines. Done and submitted my patch.txt.
